# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-direct-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-direct-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: another-direct-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: redis:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
